title: Introducing the Automation Activity Log!

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com users!

Looking to gain more visibility into your automations and integrations?! We have the solution just for you!

Keep track of all of your automations with the Automation Activity Log.

Gain insight into the date and time that the automation ran, whether or not the automation ran successfully, the name of the board, the automation recipe, and more!

You can learn all about this exciting feature here!
